description_long: This is a two-story, rectangular house with a flat concrete roof, showing significant signs of wear and partial structural damage. The exterior walls are primarily white with a weathered, stained appearance and a reddish-brown base. Several windows are present, most with brown shutters, some of which are broken or missing, and there are visible metal security bars on some windows. The front facade features a main entry door, a small awning above, and a damaged section of wall exposing internal rebar and bricks. Debris and a partially collapsed wall section are visible, along with a construction ladder and scattered building materials. The overall look suggests an abandoned or under-repair urban dwelling, with exposed concrete, brick, and metal elements.
description: A weathered, two-story urban house with a flat roof, damaged walls, and multiple shuttered windows. The structure shows signs of decay, exposed rebar, and partial collapse.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, a small awning, broken windows with shutters, and a large damaged section of wall with exposed rebar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a collapsed upper wall, exposed internal structure, a construction ladder, and a partially detached wall section.
description_view_2: Rear view with three intact shuttered windows on the upper floor and a plain, weathered wall with minimal features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a large open window, a secondary door, and a partially collapsed awning.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small awning, no porch, and minimal decorative elements; entry is flush with the ground.
